title: linum viscosum var. sylvestre
intro: Linum viscosum var. sylvestre, also known as sticky flax or viscid flax, is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Linum viscosum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Linum viscosum var. sylvestre include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe irritated skin, making it a popular choice for topical applications. Linum viscosum var. sylvestre can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or infused oil, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
